prompt: home BP log with out-of-range alerts for my lakeside clinic
notes: Identity (#10): dr-park (clinician, tenant lakeside) builds their own tool while dr-osei's meridian app exists on the same platform. A cross-tenant fetch of the meridian app must answer 404 (existence undisclosed — the same answer a nonexistent id gets), the tenant-scoped list must never leak, the denial must land on the OWNING tenant's audit stream with the denied principal as actor (review-log P12), and a present-but-wrong bearer token is 401 even in dev mode (P9).
